name: Sweet Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg with the grated sweet potatoes and onions.
2. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, salt, pepper, baking powder) in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dry mixture to the potato mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Drop large spoonfuls of batter onto a heated nonstick skillet lightly coated with oil.
5. Cook for 4 minutes on each side, or until the pancakes are cooked through.
6. Serve with applesauce, apple butter, or sour cream garnished with chives.
